properties.name: app.jwtSecret
properties.description: Secret key for signing JWT tokens (Base64 encoded, min 256 bit)

properties.name: app.jwtExpirationMs
properties.description: JWT access token expiration time in milliseconds

properties.name: app.secure-cookie
properties.description: Set httpOnly cookie Secure flag. false for local HTTP, true for production HTTPS

properties.name: google.userInfoUri
properties.description: Google OAuth2 user info endpoint URI
